pages.title: Capa
pages.observation: Red signature field; overlaid archaeological plan; framed ruins photograph; institutional marks.
pages.notes: High-impact opening; avoid using red as default reading background.

pages.title: Guarda e folha de rosto
pages.observation: Red location panel and white title page; strong contrast between orientation and silence.
pages.notes: Use as reference for project entry and chapter transitions.

pages.title: Folha de rosto institucional
pages.observation: Large white field, restrained title and institutional signatures.
pages.notes: Reference for calm institutional pages and generous whitespace.

pages.title: Índice
pages.observation: Mosaic detail occupies the visual field; white index column creates a sharp editorial split.
pages.notes: Strong model for visual index and section navigation.

pages.title: Situação
pages.observation: Red thematic spread with line plan, location photography and text over colour.
pages.notes: Keep red for openings; do not reproduce small low-contrast body text.

pages.title: Introdução e enquadramento histórico
pages.observation: Three-column reading with coins, ceramic vessel and marine illustration as anchored objects.
pages.notes: Translate object placement into responsive editorial modules.

pages.title: Retrospectiva historiográfica
pages.observation: Historical plan dominates the right page; text and aerial image support historiography.
pages.notes: Core reference for source-led plans and historiographical content.

pages.title: História das pesquisas
pages.observation: Large architectural photographs above or beside text; restrained captions.
pages.notes: Good model for photo-led contextual pages.

pages.title: Implantação e composição
pages.observation: Ceramic objects and dense body text; scan/capture continuity is weaker.
pages.notes: Do not infer colour or exact spacing from this scan.

pages.title: Planta geral das ruínas
pages.observation: Aerial photograph paired with a colour-coded site plan and legend.
pages.notes: Primary source for map/plan UI patterns, not for direct digital tracing without rights review.

pages.title: Circuito de visita - abertura
pages.observation: Full-page mosaic/ruins image and numbered circuit markers linked to text.
pages.notes: Strong basis for immersive museum sections and location markers.

pages.title: Peristilo
pages.observation: Large mosaic image with dense columns and precise captioning.
pages.notes: Retain image/text relation; increase digital type size and line spacing.

pages.title: Mosaicos figurativos
pages.observation: Three image sequence supports comparison between mosaic details and context.
pages.notes: Useful comparison pattern for memories, details and archaeological evidence.

pages.title: Salas e pavimentos
pages.observation: Vertical image, text columns and wide contextual photograph.
pages.notes: Potential responsive split-layout pattern.

pages.title: Triclínio e escultura
pages.observation: Cut-out marble element, hypothetical reconstruction and sculpture integrated with text.
pages.notes: Candidate patterns for object records and hypothesis disclosure.

pages.title: Termas
pages.observation: Large archaeological photographs paired with two-column explanatory text.
pages.notes: Good content rhythm; digital version must avoid long uninterrupted columns.

pages.title: Termas e água
pages.observation: Text-led spread with large contextual photograph and numbered references.
pages.notes: Reference for sequential archaeological interpretation.

pages.title: Pars rustica - abertura
pages.observation: Full-height dolia photograph marks section transition; text begins on facing page.
pages.notes: Strong opening pattern; suitable for Portal chapters and Museum transitions.

pages.title: Lagares de vinho
pages.observation: Small contextual photographs and explanatory line diagram support the process description.
pages.notes: Candidate for process/evidence component.

pages.title: Planta do lagar
pages.observation: Technical plan is given primary visual weight with scale, north and labels.
pages.notes: Reference for plan viewer and technical-document patterns.

pages.title: Criadagem e necrópoles
pages.observation: Comparative mosaic image and funerary building photograph above text.
pages.notes: Potential evidence comparison pattern.

pages.title: Edifícios funerários
pages.observation: Measured diagrams and inscription object cut-out on white.
pages.notes: Strong pattern for archaeological object + drawing + textual interpretation.

pages.title: Decoração artística - abertura
pages.observation: Mosaic fills the left page; line drawing and section title structure the right.
pages.notes: Key source for the visual grammar of pattern, detail and analysis.

pages.title: Mosaicos e escultura
pages.observation: Two mosaic details compare technique while sculpture becomes a full-height focal object.
pages.notes: Basis for comparison and object-focus components.

pages.title: Retratos e epigrafia
pages.observation: Multiple sculptural cut-outs and epigraphic object on white, with captions close to objects.
pages.notes: Core reference for artifact and portrait displays.

pages.title: Santuário da água - abertura
pages.observation: Monument image dominates; plan and text establish spatial interpretation.
pages.notes: Candidate chapter opener and site-feature page.

pages.title: Santuário, mosaico e alçado
pages.observation: Mosaic detail, site photograph and hypothetical elevation form an evidence sequence.
pages.notes: Excellent pattern for source triangulation and certainty labels.

pages.title: Reconstruções hipotéticas
pages.observation: Two architectural reconstructions with explicit hypothetical status.
pages.notes: Must retain visible hypothesis status in all digital uses.

pages.title: Transformações do santuário
pages.observation: Large sanctuary photograph and baptismal-pool image support continuity of use.
pages.notes: Reference for chronological reuse narratives.

pages.title: Ocupações tardo-romana e islâmica
pages.observation: Close-up column inscription creates a dramatic section opening; ceramic fragment anchors text.
pages.notes: Strong evidence-led opening; dark/black overlays may be used sparingly for callouts.

pages.title: Casa rural - abertura
pages.observation: Large rural-house photograph and mosaic detail connect later occupation to Roman remains.
pages.notes: Important model for layered chronology and relations beyond excavation history.

pages.title: Glossário - abertura
pages.observation: Mosaic detail on one page; glossary in two readable columns on white.
pages.notes: Basis for digital glossary, with improved type scale and search.

pages.title: Glossário e bibliografia
pages.observation: Reference-heavy content in restrained typography and wide margins.
pages.notes: Use for knowledge-base structure, not as direct reading scale.

pages.title: Bibliografia e centro interpretativo
pages.observation: Bibliography closes against a large architectural photograph.
pages.notes: Contextual source; current site information may be outdated.

pages.title: Informações complementares
pages.observation: Large center photograph with practical information in the facing page.
pages.notes: Do not reproduce contact or operational data without current verification.

pages.title: Contracapa
pages.observation: Red field and reduced archaeological plan form a quiet closing signature.
pages.notes: Strong reference for footer, closing screen and release cover.
